en:
# Splendor Rules

## Overview

Splendor is an engine-building card game for 2-4 players designed by Marc André, published by Space Cowboys. Players take on the role of Renaissance gem merchants, collecting gem tokens to purchase development cards that provide permanent bonuses and prestige points. The first player to reach **15 prestige points** triggers the final round.

## Components

- 40 gem tokens: 7 each in 5 colors (Diamond/White, Sapphire/Blue, Emerald/Green, Ruby/Red, Onyx/Black) + 5 Gold (wild)
- 90 development cards in 3 levels (Level 1/2/3)
- 10 noble tiles

## Setup

1. Shuffle each level of development cards separately. Place them in 3 face-down stacks, Level 1 at bottom, Level 3 at top.
2. Flip 4 cards face-up from each level (12 cards visible total).
3. Shuffle noble tiles and reveal **player count + 1** tiles (e.g., 5 tiles for 4 players). Return the rest to the box.
4. Place gem tokens in the center. For 2 players use 4 of each color; for 3 players use 5; for 4 players use all 7. Always use all 5 gold tokens.

## Turn Actions

On your turn, choose **exactly one** of the following four actions:

### 1. Take 3 Different Gems
Take 1 gem token each of 3 different colors. If fewer than 3 colors are available, take as many different colors as you can.

### 2. Take 2 Same-Color Gems
Take 2 tokens of the same color. **Only allowed if that color has at least 4 tokens remaining** before you take.

### 3. Reserve a Card + Take 1 Gold
Take any face-up development card (or blind-draw from any level stack) and place it face-down in front of you. Also take 1 gold token (if available). You may hold **at most 3** reserved cards. Reserved cards cannot be discarded — they must be purchased.

### 4. Purchase a Card
Buy a face-up card from the display **or** one of your reserved cards by paying the gem cost shown on the card.

**Paying for cards:**
- Subtract your permanent bonuses first (from previously purchased cards)
- Pay the remainder with gem tokens (returned to the supply)
- Gold tokens can substitute for any color

When a card is purchased or reserved from the display, immediately replace it from the corresponding level stack.

## Token Limit

At the end of your turn, you may hold **no more than 10 tokens** (including gold). If you exceed 10, return tokens of your choice to the supply.

## Bonuses

Each purchased development card displays a gem icon in the upper-right corner. This provides a **permanent bonus** that counts as 1 gem of that color for all future purchases. Bonuses stack — if you own 3 cards with a blue bonus, you effectively have 3 free blue gems every turn.

## Noble Visits

At the end of your turn (after purchasing), check if you meet the requirements of any noble tile. If you do, that noble **automatically visits** you — take the tile for **3 prestige points**. You may only receive 1 noble per turn. You cannot refuse a noble visit.

## Game End

When any player reaches **15 or more prestige points**, complete the current round so all players have had equal turns. The player with the most prestige points wins.

**Tiebreaker:** The player who purchased **fewer** development cards wins.

## Card Levels at a Glance

| Level | Cost Range | Points | Typical Strategy |
|-------|-----------|--------|-----------------|
| Level 1 | Low (1-4 gems) | 0-1 | Build your gem engine |
| Level 2 | Medium (5-9 gems) | 1-3 | Transition to scoring |
| Level 3 | High (10-14 gems) | 3-5 | Big point finishers |
| Nobles | — | 3 | Automatic bonus for diverse collections |
zh:
# 璀璨宝石 规则

## 概述

《璀璨宝石》是一款 2-4 人引擎构建卡牌游戏，由 Marc André 设计，Space Cowboys 出版。玩家扮演文艺复兴时期的宝石商人，收集宝石筹码来购买发展牌，获得永久折扣和声望分数。第一个达到 **15 声望分数**的玩家触发最后一轮。

## 组件

- 40 枚宝石筹码：5 种颜色各 7 枚（钻石/白、蓝宝石/蓝、祖母绿/绿、红宝石/红、玛瑙/黑）+ 5 枚黄金（百搭）
- 90 张发展牌，分 3 个等级（等级 1/2/3）
- 10 张贵族板块

## 准备

1. 将每个等级的发展牌分别洗牌，按等级从低到高（等级 1 在下，等级 3 在上）摆成 3 叠。
2. 每叠翻开 4 张牌面朝上（共 12 张可见）。
3. 洗混贵族板块，翻开**玩家人数 + 1** 张（如 4 人游戏翻 5 张），其余放回盒中。
4. 将宝石筹码放在中央。2 人游戏每色用 4 枚；3 人用 5 枚；4 人用全部 7 枚。黄金始终用全部 5 枚。

## 回合行动

每回合必须从以下四个行动中**选择一个**执行：

### 1. 拿取 3 枚不同颜色的宝石
从供应区拿取 3 枚不同颜色的宝石筹码。如果可选颜色不足 3 种，则尽可能拿不同颜色。

### 2. 拿取 2 枚同色宝石
拿取 2 枚相同颜色的筹码。**仅在该颜色剩余至少 4 枚时**才可执行。

### 3. 保留 1 张牌 + 拿 1 枚黄金
从场上翻开的牌中选一张（或从任意等级牌堆盲抽一张），面朝下放在自己面前。同时获得 1 枚黄金筹码（如有）。最多同时持有 **3 张**保留牌，保留牌不可丢弃，只能购买。

### 4. 购买 1 张牌
购买场上翻开的牌**或**自己保留的牌，支付卡牌上标示的宝石费用。

**支付方式：**
- 先扣除已购牌提供的永久减免（宝石奖励）
- 用宝石筹码支付剩余费用（筹码归还供应区）
- 黄金筹码可替代任意颜色

购买或保留场上的牌后，立即从对应等级的牌堆补充一张。

## 筹码上限

回合结束时，持有的筹码总数不得超过 **10 枚**（含黄金）。超出部分须退回供应区。

## 宝石奖励（减免）

每张已购发展牌右上角标有一颗宝石图标，提供该颜色的**永久减免**——相当于今后每次购买时自动拥有 1 枚该色宝石。减免可叠加：拥有 3 张蓝色奖励的牌 = 每次自动提供 3 枚免费蓝宝石。

## 贵族来访

回合结束时（购买后），检查是否满足任一贵族的需求。如果满足，该贵族**自动来访**——获得该贵族板块，得 **3 声望分数**。每回合最多获得 1 位贵族，不可拒绝贵族来访。

## 游戏结束

当任一玩家达到 **15 分或以上**时，完成当前轮次（确保所有玩家回合数相同）。声望分数最高者获胜。

**平局判定：** 购买发展牌**数量较少**的玩家获胜。

## 卡牌等级一览

| 等级 | 费用范围 | 分数 | 策略定位 |
|------|---------|------|---------|
| 等级 1 | 低（1-4 宝石） | 0-1 | 构建宝石引擎 |
| 等级 2 | 中（5-9 宝石） | 1-3 | 过渡到得分 |
| 等级 3 | 高（10-14 宝石） | 3-5 | 大分终结者 |
| 贵族 | — | 3 | 多样化收集的自动奖励 |
